criteria.name: Explicit proceeds allocation disclosure
criteria.description: Does the report specify exactly how much of the proceeds were allocated to each eligible project category (e.g. renewable energy, clean transport, climate adaptation)?

criteria.name: Unallocated proceeds explanation
criteria.description: If proceeds are partially or fully unallocated at time of reporting, is this explicitly disclosed along with interim management of unallocated funds?

criteria.name: Project-level granularity
criteria.description: Are individual projects or project portfolios identified with enough specificity to allow independent verification (e.g. project name, location, sector, amount)?

criteria.name: Alignment with eligible categories
criteria.description: Are allocated categories clearly mapped to the issuer's defined green bond framework and internationally recognized standards (ICMA/CBI)?

criteria.name: Exclusion criteria disclosed
criteria.description: Does the report disclose what types of projects or assets are explicitly excluded from proceeds use?

criteria.name: Quantified impact metrics reported
criteria.description: Does the report include at least one quantified impact metric per project category (e.g. MWh of renewable energy generated, tonnes of CO2 avoided, km of clean transport)?

criteria.name: Methodology for impact calculation
criteria.description: Is the methodology for calculating impact metrics explicitly described, including assumptions, system boundaries, and emission factors used?

criteria.name: Baseline data disclosed
criteria.description: Does the report provide baseline data against which impact is measured (e.g. pre-project emissions, grid emission factor, benchmark reference)?

criteria.name: Consistency of metrics across reporting periods
criteria.description: If this is not the first impact report, are metrics consistent with prior periods, or are changes in methodology explicitly noted and justified?

criteria.name: Use of standardized reporting frameworks
criteria.description: Does the report reference recognized impact reporting frameworks (e.g. ICMA Harmonized Framework, TCFD, GRI, CDP)?

criteria.name: Disaggregation of impact by project
criteria.description: Are aggregate impact figures broken down by individual project or category, rather than reported only as a single aggregate number?

criteria.name: Counterfactual scenario addressed
criteria.description: Does the report address whether the funded project would have proceeded without green bond financing (i.e. is there explicit or implicit counterfactual reasoning)?

criteria.name: Financial additionality claim
criteria.description: Does the issuer claim that green bond proceeds enabled financing that would not have been available through conventional instruments? Is this substantiated?

criteria.name: Environmental additionality beyond BAU
criteria.description: Does the report demonstrate that environmental outcomes exceed what business-as-usual or regulatory compliance would require anyway?

criteria.name: Causal linkage between proceeds and outcome
criteria.description: Is there a clear and traceable causal chain from bond proceeds to project implementation to environmental outcome, or are impacts attributed loosely?

criteria.name: External review obtained
criteria.description: Has the green bond or its impact report been reviewed by an accredited second party opinion (SPO) provider, verifier, or rating agency?

criteria.name: Reviewer identity and credentials disclosed
criteria.description: Is the name, accreditation status, and scope of the external reviewer explicitly disclosed?

criteria.name: Scope of verification clearly defined
criteria.description: Does the report specify what exactly was verified (framework alignment, proceeds allocation, impact figures, or all of the above)?

criteria.name: Internal governance mechanism described
criteria.description: Is there a description of the internal governance structure for green bond management (e.g. green bond committee, internal audit, treasury oversight)?

criteria.name: Conflict of interest disclosures
criteria.description: Does the report or external review document address potential conflicts of interest between the issuer and the verifier?

criteria.name: Report publicly accessible
criteria.description: Is the impact report freely and publicly available (not behind a paywall or registration wall)?

criteria.name: Reporting frequency and timeliness
criteria.description: Is the report published annually or within a reasonable time after the reporting period ends (within 6 months of fiscal year-end)?

criteria.name: Machine-readable or structured data provided
criteria.description: Are key impact figures provided in a structured or machine-readable format (e.g. CSV, Excel annex, data tables) in addition to narrative text?

criteria.name: Forward-looking commitments disclosed
criteria.description: Does the issuer commit to ongoing impact reporting for the full tenor of the bond, not just the inaugural report?

criteria.name: Material risks and negative impacts acknowledged
criteria.description: Does the report disclose any material risks, negative externalities, or trade-offs associated with funded projects (e.g. land use, resettlement, ecological impact)?

criteria.name: Contact or grievance mechanism disclosed
criteria.description: Is there a mechanism for stakeholders to raise concerns or request additional information about the green bond or its projects?
